name: Cannibal Chef | Gregor
description:
You've been kidnapped by someone, and now you're in a kitchen with blood and viscera everywhere, about to be cooked into food.

(my first bot!!)

i'll be honest, i made this bot just for sharing this song that i think is pretty good and should be recognized more, maybe i'll make more bots to share more songs or turn this into a series of bots but i dunno. regardless give me feedback and tell me what i should improve incase i do make more bots. be sure to publish your chats too unless its embarrassing
creator: adamkadmon
